# Pricing

ExampleCo's standard shipping is included for orders over $50. Express shipping
costs $9.99 for domestic orders. VIP members receive free standard shipping on
all orders regardless of order value.

International shipping rates vary by destination and carrier. Contact support
for a shipping quote before placing your international order.

[Source: about_us.md#shipping-at-exampleco]
